item.title: Road work sign and sandbag left., 19th March
item.description:
What 3 words: debate.warm.daily on Merriville Road. Roadwork sign and sand bag left behind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Merriville Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
